scripts.bootstrap: npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix services/member-service && npm install --prefix services/job-service && npm install --prefix services/application-service && npm install --prefix services/messaging-service && npm install --prefix services/analytics-service && npm install --prefix services/connection-service && npm install --prefix services/post-service
scripts.dev:ai-service: cd services/ai-service && conda run -n ai-env uvicorn main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001
scripts.start:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:member-api" "npm run dev:member-worker" "npm run dev:connection-api" "npm run dev:job-api" "npm run dev:job-worker" "npm run dev:app-api" "npm run dev:app-worker" "npm run dev:msg-api" "npm run dev:msg-worker" "npm run dev:analytics-api" "npm run dev:analytics-worker" "npm run dev:post-api" "npm run dev:ai-service"
